# McpTask.PollIntervalMs property

OPTIONAL. The recommended MINIMUM interval, in milliseconds, a client SHOULD wait between successive `tasks/get` polls; clients SHOULD NOT poll more frequently (§25.4, §25.7).

public long? PollIntervalMs { get; set; }
